seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: New SDK enables embedding Codex directly into Python apps for starting threads, running turns, streaming progress, resuming sessions, passing images, and controlling sandbox access while reusing existing auth; supports mid-stream message steering.

Multi-agent swarms on Abacus AI supercomputer using models like Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5, GPT 5.5; specialized agents for coding/testing/research with master agent orchestration via English instructions for complex SaaS/automations.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Bypassing pre-built indices for agents to directly grep corpora yields massive efficiency (14GB memory + 1-min setup vs. hundreds of GBs + GPU-hours); paradigm shift for agentic RAG with better multi-hop reasoning.
New benchmark quantifying long-horizon recall gaps in autonomous agents beyond file-based memory like OpenClaw; evaluates memory across noisy cross-tool interactions for long-horizon tasks.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Multi-agent crews executing tasks automatically with 327% growth in enterprise; shift from chat to autonomous execution.
near_misses.reason: Interesting trend but lacks specific technical details or new repo/framework.

notes: Limited high-signal posts in past 24h from seeds and global; focused on actionable AI agent SDKs, swarms, retrieval/memory innovations. No major new repos or efficiency breakthroughs beyond these.
